title: kitamuria glehnii
side_effects: Kitamuria glehnii can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can also cause gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Furthermore, improper use of Kitamuria glehnii may lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and lowered blood pressure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Kitamuria glehnii for any health purposes.
